title: ageratina lorentzii
intro: Ageratina lorentzii, also known as the Mexican shrub verbena, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina lorentzii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
